title: LACTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: ASANTE ASHLAND COMMUNITY HOSPITAL LACTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides lactation support services for all stages of breastfeeding. Also hosts a mom's group and offers breastfeeding classes. 280 Maple Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Breastfeeding families, families with young children Hours: -Monday-Friday 9am-4pm. Message line available after hours. -Mom's group: Tuesday 10:30am-noon -Breastfeeding class days and times vary Email (541) 201-4210 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 201-4210 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to speak with a Lactation Consultant or schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Jackson, Josephine, and Klamath Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - FAMILY BIRTH CENTER INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - ASANTE MEDICAL CENTERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASANTE ASHLAND COMMUNITY HOSPITAL
